case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. WILSON CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, WILSON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-08-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-02-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-23-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED DEC-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, WILSON

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-22-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-08-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $395.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, WILSON
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
WAIVER OF ALL ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, WILSON $60,611.84 PRINCIPAL, $395.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $61,006.84, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-22-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
